# CWE-347 vulnerable: Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-347-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/base64"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func ApplyWebhookClaims(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	raw := r.Header.Get("X-Webhook-JWT")
	parts := strings.Split(raw, ".")
	payload, _ := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[1])
	var claims map[string]interface{}
	_ = json.Unmarshal(payload, &claims)
	_, err := db.Exec("UPDATE operators SET role = ? WHERE id = ?", claims["role"], claims["sub"])
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
